title: dryopteris chrysocoma var. costalisora
intro: Dryopteris chrysocoma var. costalisora, also known as the Golden Buckler Fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris chrysocoma var. costalisora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
